title: How to use `write_aiger` ?
body:
hi,
How to use `write_aiger` correctly?

When I call it, it crashes with
```
6. Executing AIGER backend.
ERROR: Unsupported cell type: $_ORNOT_ ($abc$646$auto$blifparse.cc:346:parse_blif$648)
```

The full sequence of commands I use is:
```
./yosys
read_verilog ./tests/simple/fsm.v
flatten
write_aiger /tmp/hoho.aag
```

(I use the latest version from the repo). Thanks!
code_blocks:
6. Executing AIGER backend.
ERROR: Unsupported cell type: $_ORNOT_ ($abc$646$auto$blifparse.cc:346:parse_blif$648)
